---
title: "Making R Fast: Rcpp and Parallelization"
short-title: "Performance"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "When to leave base R — Rcpp, future, furrr, and data.table for game simulations."
keywords: ["Rcpp", "parallelization", "performance", "future", "data.table"]
---

# Performance {#sec-performance-rcpp}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
